name: Hot Spiced Crab Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Tobasco or other pepper sauce
1 Bottle of Dry White Wine (26.5 oz)
2 large Cooked Dungeness Crab (about 2 lbs each), cleaned and cracked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle (at least 8 quarts), heat butter until bubbling.
2. Stir in onion and garlic, cooking over medium heat until the onion is soft.
3. Add hot pepper seasoning, cayenne, parsley, bay leaf, broth, and wine to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmering point.
5. Add crab, cover, and continue simmering for about 10 minutes or until heated through.
6. Serve with hot Parmesan garlic bread, a salad, and another bottle of the wine used.
